# Chapter 10: Networks and protocols  (~110 pp)
- 10.1 Layered architecture (12) · 10.2 Physical and link layer (12) · 10.3 IP routing (15) · 10.4 TCP, UDP, QUIC (18) · 10.5 DNS (12) · 10.6 HTTP, TLS (18) · 10.7 BGP and the inter-domain routing problem (12) · 10.8 Failure section: BGP misconfigurations, DNS outages, head-of-line blocking (11)

**Archetype**: transport, interface, failure. **Project**: trace a HTTPS request packet by packet; document at each layer. **Exercises**: 30.
